case_title: JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. VS. MELISSA M BOYD

docket_entries.description: UNDER APPLICATION TO THE CLERK FOR JUDGMENT UNDER SEC 585(1) C.C.P., IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF JPMORGAN CHASE BANK, N.A. RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT BOYD, MELISSA M $14,762.68 PRINCIPAL, TOTAL JUDGMENT $14,762.68, SEE SCANNED DOCUMENT (TRANSACTION ID # 66974092)
